{{Navbox
| name      = Baruch Spinoza 
| title     = [[Baruch Spinoza|Baruch Spinoza (Benedictus de Spinoza)]]
| state     = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| bodyclass = hlist

| group1 = [[:Category:Works by Baruch Spinoza|Works by]]
| list1  = 
*''[[Tractatus de Intellectus Emendatione]]'' (1662)
*''[[Principia philosophiae cartesianae]]'' (1663)
*''[[Tractatus Theologico-Politicus]]'' (1670)
*''[[Tractatus Politicus]]'' (1675–1676)
*''[[Ethics (Spinoza book)|Ethics]]'' (1677)

| group2 = [[:Category:Spinozism|Concepts and theories]]
| list2  =  
*[[Immanence]]
*''[[Conatus]]''
*[[Multitude]]
*''[[Causa sui]]''
*[[Pantheism]]
*[[Determinism]]
*[[Secularism]]

| group3 = [[List of works about Baruch Spinoza|Works about]]
| list3  =
*[[:Category:Cultural depictions of Baruch Spinoza|Cultural depictions]]
*''[[Spinoza: Practical Philosophy]]''
*''[[New Jerusalem (play)|New Jerusalem]]'' (2008 play)
*[[Spinoza Prize]]

| below = 
* {{icon|commons}} [[commons:Special:Search/Baruch Spinoza|'''Commons''']]
* {{icon|wikiquote}} [[wikiquote:Special:Search/Baruch Spinoza|'''Wikiquote''']]
* {{icon|wikisource}} [[wikisource:Special:Search/Author:Baruch Spinoza|'''Wikisource texts''']]
}}<noinclude>
{{doc|content=
{{collapsible option}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Spinoza, Baruch}}
[[Category:Dutch writer navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Philosopher navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Baruch Spinoza|Ξ]]
}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
